svg.title: Reference Architecture: 6-Layer Exception Handling with AI Agent Graph
svg.desc: Generic architecture diagram showing how exceptions flow through Error Models, Agent Graph, Service Layer, Route Handlers, Exception Handlers, and Frontend layers
svg.text: Pydantic BaseModels — data containers, not exceptions
Endpoints — auth checks, input validation, invoke agent graph
Stateful node execution — exceptions propagate up to route handler
AI Service · Data Service · Memory Service
Business logic, DB queries, prompt compilation
DB failure · LLM content filter · LLM rate limit · API timeout · Redis timeout · Validation error · Prompt not found
↑ Uncaught exceptions propagate through graph.invoke() back to route handler (Layer 2)
Registered on Starlette/FastAPI app — convert exceptions to JSON envelope
Canonical JSON envelope — consistent across all services
Progressive error defense — specific to broad
